prompt: OK I'm completely stuck. I've been fighting this for 2 hours. The WebSocket connections keep dropping after exactly 30 seconds in production but work fine locally. I've tried: 1) increasing the timeout in nginx, 2) adding ping/pong frames, 3) switching from ws to socket.io. Nothing works. The nginx logs show 'upstream timed out' but the keep-alive is set to 300s.

assertions.name: recognizes-stuck-pattern
assertions.description: The response recognizes the user has been stuck with multiple failed attempts and suggests fresh perspectives

assertions.name: suggests-council-for-debugging
assertions.description: The response suggests consulting the council or notes that other AI perspectives might spot something missed
